claim: GATA3 regulates self-renewal capacity in bone marrow hematopoietic stem cells.
evidence_sentences: In the present study, we show that Gata3-null mutant mice generate fewer LT-HSCs and that fewer Gata3-null LT-HSCs are in cycle.
Therefore, GATA-3 is required for the maintenance of a normal number of LT-HSCs and for their entry into the cell cycle.
